texto: Mmm, being irresistibly likeable is such a trial,' she drawled in an impeccable aristocratic whine. 'One is constantly in demand, but one must do one's duty, mustn't one, dear chap? Noblesse oblige and all that...
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Susan Napier que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Mmm, being irresistibly likeable is such a trial,' she drawled in an impeccable aristocratic whin…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, sarcasm, snobbery, com foco em snobbery.
